wins: Double-digit growth in revenue, operating income, and earnings per share
Strong net inflows of $140 billion (excluding low-fee institutional index outflows)
Successful integration of GIP and Preqin acquisitions
risks: Performance fees decreased due to lower private markets and liquid alternatives revenue
Uncertainty in global markets and potential regulatory changes
Market volatility and potential for short-term capital outflows
Potential challenges in scaling private markets into retirement products
